name: callout
description: Alert boxes for important information with variants
whenToUse: Use for tips, notes, warnings, and supplementary information. The reader can continue without acting on it immediately.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for system feedback — use Alert. Do not nest callouts. Do not use for quotations — use Blockquote.
example:
<Callout variant="warning" title="Breaking change">
  This API was removed in v2.0. Use the new `useCollapse` hook instead.
</Callout>
